creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason W. Bacon from comment #11)
The recommendation to change the MAC of the wired adapter sounds good.

Out of curiosity, should you not be able to change the MAC of any wlan device regardless of the underlying wireless driver?  If you can, then it may be better to suggest changing it on the wlan device since it would always work.  Perhaps, it already works on all wired devices?

I also wonder if this bug still exists or not.
